svg.text: CDS flank phase colors: 0=blue 1=amber 2=rose (drawn on exon left/right edges when CDS ranges exist)
cell color intensity encodes exon support frequency
frequency color: transition support; E# color: exon genomic length %3 (heuristic frame cue)
- shared start=11429 with 2 alternative 5' exon end(s)
- shared start=13275 with 2 alternative 5' exon end(s)
- shared end=7912 with 3 alternative 3' exon start(s)
- shared end=14844 with 2 alternative 3' exon start(s)
Splicing expert view: one lane per transcript on a shared genomic axis. Exon geometry is coordinate-true (labels never resize exon/intron
footprints). Donor/acceptor splice boundaries are marked, junction arcs summarize support across transcripts, and the transcript-vs-exon
